{{CargoRelic
|name=Sermon Picture
|class_id=21565
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This picture depicts a scene of preaching in Buddhism, showing the Buddha teaching his disciples. The painting was unearthed from the Tang dynasty, with the Brahmin in the painting dressed in Western attire, while the Buddha is in typical Chinese native attire. The painting's lines are delicate, the figures' postures are graceful, and the heavenly garments flutter, making it a masterpiece of Tang dynasty religious painting. Through the Sermon Picture, believers can more intuitively understand Buddhist stories and teachings, thereby deepening their identification with Buddhist culture and their piety in faith.
|fame=62
|art=74
|fth=107
|civ=47
|tech=72
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
